title: sorbus orbiculata
intro: Sorbus orbiculata, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating gastrointestinal issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. Sorbus orbiculata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
